name: Suspicious Cron Job
description: Cron job executing binary from /tmp directory
recommendation: Review cron job, analyze binary, check for persistence

name: Root SSH Login
recommendation: Disable root SSH login, use sudo instead

name: Base64 Encoded Command
description: Base64 decoding often used to obfuscate commands
recommendation: Decode and analyze command, check parent process

name: Wget to Unknown IP
description: Downloading file from IP address (not domain)
recommendation: Analyze downloaded file, block IP if malicious
